creator: otaciliodearaujo@gmail.com
text:
Seamless mode don't work on FreeBSD Guest i386 using virtualbox-ose-additions-4.3.22. The kernel continuously shows a message "vboxguest: VBoxGuestFreeBSDIOCtl: bad size 0; pArg=0xc7c63150 Cmd=3222296069." with a interval of about 1 second. If the process "/usr/local/bin/VBoxClient --seamless" is killed the message ends.

My guest system:

FreeBSD xareu 10.1-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p5 #0: Tue Jan 27 08:52:50 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
